name: io.github.codespar/mcp-coinbase-commerce
description: MCP server for Coinbase Commerce — global crypto merchant payments. Create charges, checkouts, and invoices so buyers can pay in BTC, ETH, USDC and more; Coinbase settles to crypto or fiat.

environmentVariables.name: COINBASE_COMMERCE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Coinbase Commerce API key. Create one at https://beta.commerce.coinbase.com/settings/security.

environmentVariables.name: COINBASE_COMMERCE_API_VERSION
environmentVariables.description: Coinbase Commerce API version pin (X-CC-Version header). Defaults to 2018-03-22.
